case_title: MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. VS. PELLEGRINI, LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,140.75 FILED BY MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. DBA  COMPLETE LINEN SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI, LLC. DBA   PIAZZA PELLEGRINI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$91.50) SERVED DEC-28-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI, LLC. DBA   PIAZZA PELLEGRINI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI, LLC. DBA   PIAZZA PELLEGRINI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RICHARD BRUNI GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WITNESS MR. HERRADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MEHRDAD HADJIANFARD OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. DBA  COMPLETE LINEN SERVICE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI, LLC. DBA   PIAZZA PELLEGRINI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDICAL LINEN SERVICE, INC. DBA  COMPLETE LINEN SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI, LLC. DBA   PIAZZA PELLEGRINI $2,561.56 PRINCIPAL, $141.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,703.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
